name: hollow shards
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ then do an Attack against a Nearby target. On Hit: Deal 1 physical damage and the next time you activate this Art it does 1 extra damage this turn. (Stacking.) Bonus: +1 to the Attack Sum.

name: force away
effect: Spend ⚂⚂⚂ then every creature you can Reach must roll Finesse. On a Partial they take 1 physical damage. On a Failure do the Partial and they get Knocked back 4 tiles.

name: splinters
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 1 Strain then do an Attack against up to 3 Nearby targets. You may pick the same target multiple times, making them do multiple Dodge rolls. On Hit: Deal 1 physical damage. Bonus: Pick 1 extra target. Downside: Pick 1 less target.

name: arc thrower
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ then do a Elemental Attack against a Nearby Target. If you target a Gadget or Mechanism you may activate or deactivate it for 1 minute (6 turns). On Hit: Do 1 damage and 1 Burn. Bonus: Pick a new target within Reaching range and repeat this Attack.

name: blood thinning dart
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ then pick a Nearby target, they must do a Physique roll. On a Partial they cant Heal until the start of your next turn. On a Failure do the Partial effect and they also take 1 Spirit damage.

name: shooting star
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ then do a Spirit Attack against a Nearby target. On Hit: Make the target illuminate the surrounding area and until the beginning of your next turn they take 1 damage for every tile they are forcefully moved. Bonus: Knockback the target 2 + your Ingenuity or Spirit.

name: augment
effect: Spend ⚂ and 1 Strain to do one of the following based on the ⚂'s value. These effects last a few minutes. 1,2: Give a creature +1 Speed. 3,4: Give a target 1 Shielding. 5,6: Give a Weapon +1 Burn on Hit.

name: bless
effect: Spend ⚂, 0 Strain, and pick a Close target. The target gets +1 Forward, then roll Spirit. On a Failure increase this Art's Strain cost by 1 until your next Rest.

name: heavy duty lock
effect: Over a few moments put a special Lock on an entryway, container, or similar target Close to you. The Lock can be locked or unlocked by presenting some form of password or object (such as a special symbol) which is declared when made.

name: force away
effect: Spend ⚂⚂⚂ then every creature you can Reach must roll Finesse. On a Partial they take 1 damage. On a Failure do the Partial and they get Knocked back 4 tiles

name: molly
effect: Spend ⚂⚂⚂ and 1 Strain then pick a point Nearby. Everything within Reach of that point gains 2 Burn.

name: grenade
effect: Spend ⚂⚂⚂ and 1 Strain then pick then pick a point Nearby. Everything within Reach of that point must roll Finesse. On a Partial they go Prone. On a Failure do the Partial effect and they take 1 damage

name: destructive swing
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ then do a Close Weapon Attack with -2 to the Attack Sum (this does not effect Bonuses and Downsides). This Attack gains +1 damage

name: maneuver
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ then do a Close Weapon Attack. You may choose to move 2 tiles before or after this Attack

name: footwork lure
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ then do a Close Weapon Attack. On Hit, make the target move somewhere within Reaching of you

name: cleave
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 1 Strain, then do a Close Weapon Attack against all targets Close to you

name: precision strike
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 1 Strain, then do a Weapon Attack with +3 to the Attack Sum (this does not effect Bonuses and Downsides)

name: piercing shot
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 1 Strain, then do a Weapon Attack. It damages all targets in a line up to your Weapons Range. This may go through weak walls

name: ricochet
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 2 Strain, then do a Nearby, Far, or Distant Weapon Attack. On Hit, pick a new target within 3 tiles of this one and repeat this Art without spending Strain or dice. Use the same Attack Sum. (You cannot bounce to an already chosen target.

name: headbutt
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ then do a Close Attack. On Hit: Give the target 2 Stun, or if you are Grappling the target give them 4 Stun instead. Bonus: +1 Stun. Downside: -1 Stun

name: train of thought
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ then gain a dice that has a value of the combined dice (to a maximum of a 6).

name: bull rush
effect: Spend ⚂ then Move. During this Move you may go through weak walls. You Knockback creatures you move into equal to your Physique, and destroy segments of t

name: deployable wall
effect: Spend ⚂ then make a wall you can Reach that is up to 3 tiles long and 1 tile high. It has ⚂/3 Health (round up). (Objects always get Hit, Fail Checks, and lose Contests)

name: defender
effect: Spend a Locked ⚂ to do one of the following: Give a creature Close to you Obscured until the end of the turn. When a creature Close to you is Hit you may take the Hit instead. When you get Hit reduce damage by ⚂/3 (round up)

name: reach for it
effect: Spend 1 Strain to increase the range of an action by 1 tier. Close -> Reaching -> Near -> Far -> Distant

name: taunt
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and do a Presence Contest against a creature Nearby. If you win, the target must interact with you and has -3 Forward to their next roll not pertaining to you. (This may make you the sole target of a creatures Attacks). If you lose, spend 1 Strain

name: smoke
effect: Spend ⚂⚂⚂ then pick then pick a point Nearby. Everything within Reach of that point becomes Obscured for a minute

name: track creature
effect: Spend ⚂ to follow the path of a creature which you have named or have evidence of. If the creature is within 1 days worth of travel of you, a path will appear in front of you guiding you along

name: disguise
effect: Over a few minutes, or if you spend ⚂⚂⚂ and 1 Strain a moment, give a creature Close to you a Disguise. The Disguise can change physical appearance, clothes, and/or the way they smell. While someone has this Disguise they get +1 Ongoing to act as the Disguise or to hide who they are. The Disguise lasts for a few hours or until they take damage

name: hollow heart poison
effect: Spend ⚂ and pick a Close Creature. For the next few hours their heart stops, skin turns pale, and they are perceived to be dead while not moving by all forms of investigation. Animals which normally feed on dead creatures will ignore them after inspection

name: uncanny climb
effect: Spend ⚂ and 1 Strain; Focus on making a creature you touch able to walk on walls and ceilings for up to 1 hour

name: alarm
effect: Over a few minutes put a special Alarm on a location, container, or item Close to you. The Alarm goes off when something happens (such as being touched or moved) and can set off items, make a loud noise, or inform you specifically of being triggered

name: weightless
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 1 Strain to make a target weightless for a few minutes. If the target is unwilling do an Ingenuity Contest, making them weightless if you win. While weightless the target is no longer tied down by gravity and can 'swim' through the air. All terrain is counted as Rough Terrain while 'swimming'

name: hook shot
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ to pull a small object Far from you Close to you. If you target something larger do a Physique roll. On a Partial, pull the target 3+Physique tiles towards you. On a Success pull twice as far

name: hologram
effect: Spend ⚂ to make a simple Hologram thats no bigger than a person somewhere Nearby. The Hologram can be animated and lasts for a few minutes. A creature may do a Look Around or Investigate contest against you to discern if it's a Hologram

name: party tricks
effect:
Spend ⚂ then pick *Grow or Wither, Set the Stage, Strange Steps, or BE LOUD*; these effects last for a few minutes.
- *Grow or Withe

name: quantum toy
effect:
Spend ⚂ then pick *Move, Memory Perl, or Small Hole*; these effects last for a few minutes.
- *Mov

name: mini terraformer
effect:
Spend ⚂ to change the general shape, color, and temperature of loose earth (such as dirt, gravel, or sand), non-special gasses (such as fog, smoke, or air), fires, and simple liquids (such as water or oil) up to a maximum of 1 cubic tile. 
- *Some examples are; being able to freeze water, ignite or snuff out small fires, dry wet objects or creatures, make air bubbles in water (extends breathable air to a few minutes), and remove grime from surfaces.

name: captain's orders
effect: You may give ⚂⚂ to another creature. They may do any action(s) with these dice immediately. (These dice are lost if not used.

name: plan ahead
effect: Spend ⚂ to roll 2d6 and Lock one of them

name: cap mark
effect: Spend ⚂ to give a target you can see Marked until the start of your next turn. You gain +1 Forward on Size Up or Manipulate Someone against them.

name: oil patch
effect: Spend ⚂⚂⚂ then pick a surface Nearby. Cover every surface within 3 tiles of this point in Oil. If a creature moves across this patch they fall Prone unless the dice spent was a 5 or 6 (roll a d6 if not in combat). Targets covered in oil gain 3 extra Burn when they first gain Burn stacks. (Fire will spread through the oil)

name: field repair
effect: Spend ⚂ and 1 Strain then pick a target within Reach. Give that target a Temporary Shield and remove all Burn on them

name: super heat
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 1 Strain to make a metal object Close to you glow white hot for a few minutes. You get +1 to Tinker on the object, and anything (other than you) that touches it gains 2 Burn once a turn

name: eye on the prize
effect: Spend ⚂ to give a target you can see Marked until the start of your next turn. If you give a 6, give them Marked for 1 hour instead. While the target is Marked this way you know the rough direction of the target regardless of distance

name: bola throw
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ then pick a Nearby Creature, they must roll Finesse. On a Failure (6-) they gain Slow or if they already have Slow, become Prone. On a Partial, they gain Slow

name: vine whip
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ then do a Slashing Attack against a Nearby Target. On Hit: Do 1 damage and you may pull the target 3 tiles towards you. Or, if you target a surface, pull yourself Close to it. Bonus: Double the distance pulled

name: wondrous smells
effect: Spend ⚂ and 1 Strain; Give all creatures of your choice Nearby a Locked 1d6 (you roll), Empowered for 1 hour, or heals 1 HP

name: thorny roots
effect: Spend ⚂⚂⚂ and pick up to 3xSpirit connected tiles on a surface. This region becomes Rough Terrain and you may spend 1 Strain to do 1 damage to any creature who moves inside it

name: meteor leap
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 1 Strain then jump 3xSpeed. If you land on or next to a target you may do a Close Attack against them

name: bless
effect: Spend ⚂, 0 Strain, and pick a Close target. The target gets +1 Forward, then roll Spirit. On a Failure increase this Trait'sStrain cost by 1 until your next Rest

name: cleanse the unworthy
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 1 Strain to do a Close Weapon Attack. The Attack gains: On Hit, the target is Marked until the beginning of your next turn and gains 3 Burn

name: miracle
effect: Once in a while, you may spend ⚂⚂⚂⚂ and 4 Strain to call forth a Miracle. Your GM determines what happens and it must only be beneficial to you and your group. This may auto pass a Check, activate an Art, make something almost impossible happen, ect

name: whispers in the void
effect: Roll Awareness or Spirit. On a Failure spend 1 Strain and you hear nothing. On a Partial Success, spend 1 Strain and ask a question to the GM. They may only answer with 1 word. On a Success, do the same but don'tspend Strain

name: maddening call
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 1 Strain. Pick a Nearby Creature, they must roll Presence. On a Failure (6-) they gain 3 Stun and -2 Forward. On a Partial, they gain 2 Stun and -1 Forward. (Minimum Forward is -3

name: telepathy
effect: Spend ⚂; Bind your mind to a willing creature'smind that you can see. You can choose to see/hear through their senses instead of your own or send/receive simple messages. You can only be bound to one creature at a time

name: wanderer'sveil
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 1 Strain. Pick a Nearby creature, they are covered in a blurry veil for up to 1 hour or until they are Hit. During this time they gain +1 Dodge and Ongoing to Hide

name: wanderer'ssight
effect: Spend 1 Strain to observe a far away location you are aware of. You may roll to Look Around in this area

name: parry
effect: Reaction (Locked ⚂) and 1 Strain; When you take damage from a Weapon Attack, reduce the damage by the dice spent (to a minimum of 1).

name: marking strike
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 1 Strain; Do a Weapon Attack. If you hit, give the target Marked until the start of your next turn.

name: shrapnel shot
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 3 Strain; Using a Ranged Weapon, pick a point within your Weapon'sRange. Do a Ranged Weapon Attack against everything within 2 tiles of that point.

name: fortify
effect: Spend ⚂ and 2 Strain; Until the beginning of your next turn you are Rooted, immune to Knockback, and gain Bonus SHIELDING equal to the dice spent

name: get behind me
effect: Spend ⚂; until the start of your next turn (10 seconds), you Obscure anything behind you. You must be larger than things that are behind you for this effect to work

name: guardian'sriposte
effect: Reaction (Locked ⚂); Do a Melee Weapon Attack against a target that Attacks you or ally within 1 tile of you. Use 3+⚂ for sum

name: i'll take it
effect: Reaction (Locked ⚂) and 1 Strain; When a creature within 1 tile of you fails a Dodge roll against an Attack, you may take the Attack instead

name: heckle
effect: Reaction (Locked ⚂) and 1 Strain; When a creature you can see does an Attack give them +CHARM damage On Hit. (This Art has no effect if the target of the Attack can'thear you.

name: motivate
effect: Spend ⚂; Give a creature that can see or hear you the dice spent on this Art. You can only use this Art a number of times per Rest equal to 2+MIND+CHARM. If this Art is used outside of combat it gives a random d4

name: find object
effect: Spend ⚂ and 2 Strain; Name or describe an object. The object can be a general item, such as a sword or crate, or it can be more specific such as a letter with a gold bird on its front. You can be as specific as you would like, such as 'My golden short sword'. You then Focus on knowing the approximate distance and direction of the nearest object you described. This has a max range of 1 large tile (2,160x2,160 tiles), failing if no item is within this range. This effect lasts 1 hour or until you see/touch the object

name: sleeping powder
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 1 Strain; Pick a point you can see within 18 tiles of you. Do a SOUL or MEDICINE contest against creatures within 3 tiles of this point. Constructs, Undead, and already asleep Creatures are unaffected.  If you win, for 1 minute, a creature spends ⚂⚂,  or until they take damage you forcefully put the creature to sleep. If you lose, the creature gains Slow until the end of their next turn instead

name: uncanny climb
effect: Spend ⚂ and 1 Strain; Focus on making a creature you touch able to walk on walls and ceilings for up to 1 hour

name: soul shield
effect: Spend ⚂ and 2 Strain; Give a target within 8 tiles of you 1 Ward and Bonus SHIELDING equal to the dice spent until the beginning of your next turn

name: soul skip
effect: Spend ⚂ and 1 Strain; Teleport to a location within 6 tiles of you

name: big or small
effect:
Spend ⚂⚂ and 3 Strain; Focus on picking a target within 6 tiles of you. You cannot target objects being worn or carried by another creature or a target that is larger than 2 tiles square. If the target is unwilling, do an Arcana Contest against them. If you win, for up to the next hour, the target is either made Bigger or Smaller. 
- Bigger: The target doubles in size and weight, gains +1 to Body rolls, +1 to Melee Weapon damage, and -1 to Thieving rolls. If you target a creature all items they are wearing or carrying grow with the creature. Dropped items shrink to normal size and items picked up after becoming bigger do not grow.
- Smaller: The target halves in size and weight, gets -1 to Body rolls,-1 to Melee Weapon damage, and +1 to Thieving rolls. You can not reduce damage below 1. If you target a creature all items they are wearing or carrying shrink with the creature. Dropped items grow to normal size and items picked up after becoming smaller do not shrink

name: rip and tear
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 1 Strain; Do a Weapon Attack, if you hit remove 8 Shielding then do the other Weapon effects

name: spectral parachute
effect: Spend ⚂ and 1 Strain; Pick up to 5 targets within 8 tiles of you. For the next 10 minutes, they are able to glide 2 tiles for every 1 tile they fall and cannot take fall damage

name: healing drop
effect: Spend ⚂ and 2 Strain; Heal a creature you can see within 8 tiles of you 2+MEDICINE. You cannot target Undead or Constructs

name: if these walls could talk
effect: Spend 1 minute and 3 Strain at a specific location; The spirits whisper what happened up to 24 hours prior. You may ask up to your MEDICINE number of questions. The spirits will answer the best they can but will never give more than a rough description. The spirits also cannot describe something that happened through magic or if it was hidden with magic, such as a creature moving under the Invisibility spell

name: invisibility
effect: Spend ⚂ and 2 Strain; Focus on making a creature you touch Invisible for up to 1 hour. If the creature does an Attack or activates an Art they lose Invisible. You may activate this Art again on a different creature Focusing on all instances of this spell without losing Focus or breaking Invisibility

name: shadow self
effect:
Spend ⚂ and 1 Strain; Turn your Shadow into a tangible creature. When cast or by spending ⚂ you may move your Shadow up to your SPEED. Your Shadow can manipulate items, and you may activate Arts or do Attacks through your shadow. Your Shadow has 1 Health and 0 Dodge. 
- While your shadow is a creature you do not have a shadow and if it was to die your shadow would be returned to you. You may have your shadow act independently of you, however it cannot activate Arts or do Attacks on its own. (It is not a Follower

name: bound souls
effect: Spend ⚂ and 3 Strain; Focus on two willing creatures within 8 tiles of you. For the next hour, you bind the souls of both creatures together. While bound together whenever either creature is healed or takes damage instead both creatures gain half healing or half damage respectively (divided as people choose)

name: spear of light or dark
effect:
Spend ⚂⚂ and 1 Strain then pick Light or Dark; Make a Thrown Spell Attack against a target within 18 tiles of you. 
- *Light*: On Hit: Do 2+SOUL damage, and the target gains Glow until the start of your next turn. Bonus: You gain Rallied. Downside: Do 2 less damage and do not apply Glow.
- *Dark*: On Hit: Do 2xSOUL damage. Bonus: You gain Empowered. Downside: Do SOUL damage instead

name: lightshow
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 1 Strain; Pick a tile you can see within 18 tiles of you. Do a Senses contest against all creatures within 3 tiles of this point. If you win, the target gains 2 Stun and is Blinded for a number of turns equal to the stat they rolled (minimum of 1). If you lose, the target is Blinded until the beginning of your next turn (10 seconds)

name: dispel magic
effect: Spend ⚂ and 3 Strain; Pick a Target being affected by magic within 8 tiles of you. Reduce the magic'sduration by a number of turns (10 second intervals) based on the dice value given. If the magic has no duration or if its duration is an hour or longer it is instead suppressed (not active) for this duration instead

name: intrusive thoughts
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 2 Strain; Do a Senses contest against a non-Undead/Construct creature you can see. If you win, you may read the creature'sinnermost thoughts for up to 10 minutes or may end it early to implant a thought into the target'smind. They believe the thought was their own. (The target does not need to act on the thought if it goes against their nature.) If you lose, you are able to read the creature'scurrent thoughts for up to 10 minutes. (This has no effect on creatures that don'tknow a language, such as an Animal.

name: chain lightning
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 3 Strain; Attack a target you can see within 18 tiles of you.  On Hit: Do 2+NATURE damage. Then pick a new target within 4 tiles of this one and do this Attack against them.  Bonus: If the target is Wet, remove Wet then pick a new target within 4 tiles of this one and do this Attack against them (This happens regardless of if it hits).  Downside: -2 damage

name: wall of thorns
effect: Spend ⚂ and 3 Strain; Focus on summoning a Wall of Thorns within 6 tiles of you for up to 10 minutes. The Wall is up to 1 tile wide and can be up to 6 tiles long or tall. The Wall has 4+2xNATURE Health, and when a creature touches the wall you may deal 2 damage to them at the beginning of their turn. If a creature is knocked back into the Wall they take 4 extra damage. Creatures may climb the wall without doing a roll

name: winds grace
effect: Spend ⚂ and 2 Strain; Focus on giving a creature you touch 2 Speed for up to 1 hour

name: tent
effect: Spend 1 minute; Create a spectral tent for 12 hours. The tent can be up to 2 tiles square on the outside and 6 tiles square on the inside. When created you may have the tent contain: up to 3 beds, an empty chest 1 tile large, a table of any size, any number of chairs, a light which illuminates the entire tent, and a rug. Items made this way cannot leave the tent. Creatures and items inside the tent are placed in the nearest open tile when the tent disappears

name: shadow step
effect: Spend ⚂ and 2 Strain; Teleport to a shadow you are aware of and would be completely covered by, that is within 18 tiles of you

name: stepping stones
effect: Spend ⚂ and 3 Strain; Teleport to a location that you can see up to a total of 12 tiles away. You can break up this teleportation into any number of 'steps' where you can do other actions. If you do not use up all of the teleportation by the end of your turn you lose the remaining steps

name: displacement
effect: Spend ⚂ and 4 Strain; You become blurry gaining +1 Dodge and an additional d4 on rolls to Hide. This effect ends after 1 hour or until you take damage

name: elemental aura
effect: Spend ⚂ and 2 Strain then pick 2 Burn, Wet, Marked, or Obscured; You may willingly gain the chosen Status, while this Aura is active. Once per turn, when a target starts its turn in or enters your Aura they gain the chosen Status

name: final words
effect: Spend ⚂ and 2 Strain; Target a dead non-Construct creature within 3 tiles of you. The soul of the creature will then awaken to answer up to 3 questions. The soul has all of its memories from when it was alive and maintains its personality. (There is a high chance that if you killed the creature it would not talk to you.) This spell cannot make the creature intelligent or teach them your language (such as with an animal). This spell will end once 3 questions are asked of it or after an hour

name: hollow heart
effect: Spend ⚂ and 1 Strain; Touch a willing creature. For the next hour their heart stops, skin turns pale, and they are perceived to be dead while not moving by both magic and investigation (They are still a creature). In this state they cannot be detected by magic and Undead will not attack them unless provoked

name: flight
effect: Spend ⚂ and 3 Strain; Focus on giving a creature you touch the ability to fly for up to 1 hour

name: fearsome roar
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 2 Strain; Do a CHARM or BODY contest against all creatures of your choice that can hear you. Undead, Constructs, and creatures you choose are unaffected by this Art. If you win, the creature has -1 on all rolls against you (Attacks, Contests, etc) until the start of your next turn and must spend a dice on their next turn moving until they can no longer see you or run out of movement. If you lose, the creature cannot willingly move toward you on their next turn.

name: haste
effect: Spend ⚂ and 4 Strain; Focus on a willing creature you touch for 1 minute. When they do a roll give them 2d6 on that roll. When this Art ends the creature gains 10 Stun and is Rooted for 2 turns (20 seconds)

name: telekinesis
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 5 Strain; Focus on moving targets around for up to 1 hour. When cast or by spending ⚂⚂, you may do an ARCANA contest against a creature or item within 18 tiles of you. If you win the target is Grappled by you and you may spend ⚂ to move the target up to 6 tiles. (This is classified as Knockback, and can take Knockback damage.) Creatures may break the Grapple by spending ⚂⚂ and doing an ARCANA contest against you. If you target an object you may manipulate it as if you were holding it

name: grounding roots
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 3 Strain; Spell Attack a target within 36 tiles of you. On Hit: Do 2+2xNATURE damage. If the target is flying they are forced to the ground (They take fall damage if possible). Bonus: The target gains Rooted until the beginning of your next turn

name: create airship
effect: Spend 1 hour and 10 Strain; You may turn a boat, cart, or similar entity into a makeshift airship. This airship has 1 Health,4xCRAFTING Shielding,4 Speed, and has a max height of 1 medium tile (36 normal tiles) off the ground. This lasts for 1 day after which the airship returns to normal

name: wall
effect: Spend ⚂ and 2 Strain; For up to 1 hour Focus on creating a Wall within 6 tiles of you. The Wall is up to 1 tile wide and can be up to 10 tiles long or tall. The Wall has 2+2xCRAFTING Health and Shielding. If a wall is made under a creature that creature is pushed up or to one side of the wall. If a creature cannot be pushed (from hitting a ceiling or wall) then the creature becomes Grappled and gains 8 stacks of Stun. Creatures and objects cannot move through the wall once made

name: life from death
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 3 Strain; Pick a point within 18 tiles of you. Do a Spell Attack against every creature within 3 tiles of that point. On Hit, do MEDICINE damage to the target and Heal a creature you can see for that amount. (Each hit activates separately.) Bonus: Do 2xMedicine damage. Downside: This does not heal

name: ritual of revival
effect: Spend 1 minute; For the next minute (6 turns), once per turn, you and any creature nearby may roll a d6+MEDICINE. On a 5 or higher the ritual gets 2 stacks. On a 3 or higher, the ritual gets 1 stack. After 1 minute you may target a dead creature within 6 tiles of you. If the total number of stacks is 18 or higher the creature is revived. The creature'sSoul must be free, and the creature cannot have been dead for more than an hour. If the creature has been revived with this ritual before, increase the stacks needed by 2x the number of times they have been revived this way

name: mist form
effect: Spend ⚂ and 4 Strain; Focus on making a creature you touch into a misty form for up to 1 hour. While they are in this form they are able to fly and may move through cracks in walls

name: mind control
effect: Spend ⚂⚂⚂ and 6 Strain; Focus on doing a Charm contest against a non-Undead/Construct creature you can see. If you win, for 1 minute the creature becomes a Follower of you. When the creature would normally take its turn, or if it takes damage from any source, redo this Charm contest (This may happen multiple times a turn.). If you lose or lost Focus, the creature gains 4 Stun

name: enrapture
effect: Make a Spellcast Roll against a target within Close range. On a success, they become temporarily Enraptured. While Enraptured, a target’s attention is fixed on you, narrowing their field of view and drowning out any sound but your voice. Once per rest on a success, you can mark a Stress to force the Enraptured target to mark a Stress as well

name: tell no lies
effect: Make a Spellcast Roll against a target within Very Close range. On a success, they can’t lie to you while they remain within Close range, but they are not compelled to speak. If you ask them a question and they refuse to answer, they must mark a Stress and the effect ends. The target is typically unaware this spell has been cast on them until it causes them to utter the truth

name: enthrall
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 3 Strain or remove Charmed from the target; Do a Charm contest against a target you can see within 8 tiles of you. If you win, make them do any simple action that wouldn'tknowingly harm themselves. (Use a 4 for any sums needed.

name: astral projection
effect: Once per long rest, mark a Stress to create a projected copy of yourself that can appear anywhere you’ve been before. You can see and hear through the projection as though it were you and affect the world as though you were there. A creature investigating the projection can tell it’s of magical origin. This effect lasts until your next rest or your projection takes any damage
